headline: Taco Bell Offers $1 Lettuce-Free Enchirito to Win Back Customers Post-Parasite

headline: Yum appoints chief people officer
summary: Nai De Leon, who joined the company from Bain Capital in 2025, will succeed Tracy Skeans in November.

headline: Yum! Brands (YUM) Appoints Nai De Leon As People Chief In Leadership Shift
summary: Yum! Brands (NYSE:YUM) has appointed Nai De Leon as Chief People Culture Officer. She succeeds longtime executive Tracy Skeans, who is retiring after a 25-year career at the company. The transition reflects a generational change within Yum! Brands' executive leadership team. Yum! Brands, the global restaurant company behind KFC, Pizza Hut, Taco Bell and other chains, is putting fresh emphasis on its people and culture priorities with this leadership change. As the company continues to focus...
